card.title: B12 + MIC Injection
card.description: Designed to support metabolism, enhance energy levels, and promote fat utilization. This formula helps your body break down fats more efficiently and convert food into energy, supporting weight management. By supporting liver function—key to fat metabolism—it promotes healthy weight management and sustained energy.
card.finePrint: No membership required. We bill & ship quarterly and you can cancel your subscription at any time. Due to state regulations we cannot ship test...

splitContent.title: The boost your body needs
features: B12 is an essential nutrient that supports overall health and wellness from the inside out.
Aids in fat metabolism and supports liver health
Boosts metabolism, improving digestion of fats, proteins, and carbs
Enhances mood, memory, and cognitive function
Supports healthy cholesterol levels and cardiovascular function
Promotes healthy skin, nails, and hair growth
